metadata.title: VulnRadar EU — NIS2 Vulnerability Management
metadata.description: European platform for vulnerability management and NIS2 compliance for SMBs.

download.errorGeneric: Couldn't generate the download. Try again.

agent.smartscreen: Windows will show a security warning the first time. Click "More info" → "Run anyway". The binary is not yet digitally signed.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Status of your inventory and active alerts.

empty.noDevicesTitle: You haven't installed the agent yet
empty.noDevicesDescription: Download the agent, install it on a Windows machine, and you'll see alerts here as soon as the first scan completes (~2 min).
empty.noAlertsDescription: This could mean your device is up to date, or that the first scan hasn't completed yet.

error.title: Couldn't load the dashboard
error.description: There was a temporary issue loading your data. Try again in a few seconds.

devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No devices} one {# device monitored} other {# devices monitored}}.

empty.title: You haven't installed the agent yet
empty.description: Download the agent, install it on a Windows machine, and it'll show up here as soon as the first scan completes.

detail.title: Device detail
detail.placeholder: Detail view under construction. For now, just shows the ID.

report.title: NIS2 Report
report.subtitle: Evidence document for NIS2 Article 21 audit.
report.exportHint: Click the button to open the print dialog and save as PDF.

cover.title: Vulnerability management report
cover.subtitle: Technical evidence for NIS2 Article 21
cover.processedIn: Data processed in the European Union (Frankfurt)

summary.heading: Executive summary
summary.statusEmpty: No devices are being monitored. Install the agent to start generating evidence.
summary.statusClean: No open alerts detected across the fleet. Keep patches up to date to maintain this state.
summary.statusKev: The fleet has {kev} actively exploited (KEV) vulnerability(ies) and {critical} critical alert(s). Immediate attention required.
summary.statusCritical: The fleet has {critical} open critical alert(s). Prioritize remediation.
summary.statusOk: {total} open alert(s), none critical. Review on the usual cadence.

topAlerts.heading: Critical and KEV alerts (top 20)
topAlerts.intro: Listing sorted by priority_score. Items tagged KEV are listed in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.
topAlerts.empty: No open alerts at this time.

eol.heading: End-of-life software (EOL)
eol.intro: Software detected in the fleet whose vendor has ended security support.

remediation.heading: Remediation metrics
remediation.intro: Operational effectiveness indicator required by Article 21.2.f (assessment of the effectiveness of measures). This version does not differentiate internal from external assets: all monitored devices are aggregated into a single figure.
remediation.metricTitle: Mean time to resolve critical alerts
remediation.metricDescription: Mean between detection and status='patched' for alerts with priority_score ≥ 9.0.
remediation.sampleValue: {count, plural, one {# resolved alert} other {# resolved alerts}}
remediation.insufficientBody: At least {min} resolved critical alerts in the last {days} days are required to compute a representative mean.
remediation.insufficientSample: Current sample: {count, plural, one {# resolved alert} other {# resolved alerts}}.

nis2.heading: NIS2 Article 21 compliance
nis2.intro: Of the 10 measures required by Art. 21.2 of Directive (EU) 2022/2555, this report documents the technical compliance of those covered by VulnRadar.
nis2.footer: This report documents compliance with Article 21.2.e (vulnerability handling and disclosure). Of the 10 required measures, VulnRadar fully covers {covered}, provides partial evidence on {partial}, and does not cover the remaining {notApplicable}, which require additional organizational controls outside the scope of this tool.

riskAnalysis.title: Risk analysis and information system security policies
riskAnalysis.justification: The device inventory and alert listing feed the technical software risk analysis. Does not cover organizational analysis or policy documentation.

incidentHandling.title: Incident handling (prevention, detection and response)
incidentHandling.justification: Detects CVE, KEV, EOL and OUTDATED across the fleet. Does not cover incident response, runbooks, or CSIRT notification.

businessContinuity.title: Business continuity, backup management and disaster recovery
businessContinuity.justification: Out of scope for this product.

supplyChain.title: Supply chain security
supplyChain.justification: Visibility over software installed on each device (input for dependency auditing). Does not cover contractual evaluation of providers.

vulnerabilityHandling.title: Security in acquisition, development and maintenance of networks and systems, including vulnerability handling and disclosure
vulnerabilityHandling.justification: Continuous detection against NVD and CISA KEV, prioritization by CVSS and priority_score, identification of EOL and outdated software. This is the main measure covered by the product.

effectiveness.title: Policies and procedures to assess the effectiveness of risk management measures
effectiveness.justification: The history of open vs closed alerts and the KPIs provide technical effectiveness metrics for measure (e). Does not evaluate other measures.

cyberHygiene.title: Basic cyber hygiene practices and cybersecurity training
cyberHygiene.justification: Out of scope for this product.

cryptography.title: Policies and procedures regarding the use of cryptography and, where appropriate, encryption
cryptography.justification: Out of scope for this product.

humanResources.title: Human resources security, access control policies and asset management
humanResources.justification: Covers asset management through the device inventory. Does not cover human resources or access control.

authentication.title: Multi-factor or continuous authentication, secure communications and secure emergency communication systems
authentication.justification: Out of scope for this product.

footer.processedIn: Data processed in the European Union (Frankfurt)

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the panel.
login.footer: Data processed in the EU · Frankfurt

errors.invalid: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
